signIn.title: Sign in

customize.title: Customize
customize.desc: Set your name, icon, and brand color. See it live.

build.title: Build
build.desc: One click. We compile, sign, and deliver your app.

email.label: Email

build.title: Ready to build?
build.desc: Your APK will be compiled and sent to your email within minutes.

errors.maxIconSize: Icon size must be less than 2MB

success.title: You're all set!
success.description: <0>{{appName}}</0> is now being compiled. Builds typically take 3–5 minutes. We'll email the download link to <1>{{userEmail}}</1> when it's ready.

nextSteps.title: What happens next
nextSteps.step1: Actions picks up the build job and compiles your Android app
nextSteps.step2: An APK is generated and signed with your shop's configuration
nextSteps.step3: A download link is emailed to {{email}}

emailReminder.title: Check your inbox in ~5 minutes
emailReminder.desc: Download link will be sent to <0>{{email}}</0>. Check spam if you don't see it.
